# LandlordShield

> UK landlord compliance software for the Renters' Rights Act

LandlordShield helps UK landlords with 1–5 rental properties stay compliant with landlord regulations including the Renters' Rights Act 2025.

## What it does

- Serves the legally required Information Sheet (Prescribed Information under S.213 Housing Act 2004) to tenants via email with PDF proof
- Tracks five key compliance certificates: Gas Safety (CP12), Electrical Safety (EICR), Energy Performance Certificate (EPC), Deposit Protection, and Smoke & CO Alarms
- Calculates a compliance score (0–100) per property
- Sends email alerts at 60, 30, and 14 days before certificate expiry
- Generates downloadable PDF compliance reports

## Key dates

- 1 May 2025: Renters' Rights Act Phase 1 — new tenancies fall under the Act
- 31 May 2025: Information Sheet deadline — fines up to £7,000 per tenancy
- July 2025: Making Tax Digital Q1 deadline

## Pricing

- Free: 1 property, full compliance checklist, Information Sheet delivery, compliance score, PDF reports
- Shield (£99/year): Unlimited properties, expiry email alerts, priority support, compliance history export

## Tech stack

- Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Resend, PostHog

## Links

- Website: https://landlordshield.co.uk
- Sign up: https://landlordshield.co.uk/signup
- Dashboard: https://landlordshield.co.uk/dashboard (requires login)
